chunks.text: IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P No. S – 176 of 2025 Hearing of case 1. For orders on office objection at flag ‘A’ 2. For hearing of main case 02.02.2026 Mr. Ali Gul Abbasi, Advocate along with Petitioner Mr. Shahryar Awan, Assistant Advocate General Sindh O R D E R Through instant Constitutional Petition, the Petitioner has impugned the order dated 17.06.2025 wherein his application for restoration of the above noted Family Appeal No.10 of 2024 before the Court of Additional District Judge-I, Mirpur Mathelo was dismissed on the ground that no sufficient cause was made out for restoration of the noted appeal. It is apparent from the perusal of the record that the Appeal was dismissed on 15.02.2025 and the application for restoration was filed on 03.03.2025. I have examined the application and the grounds taken in the same. It is apparent from the contents of the application that the mother of the petitioner was unwell, therefore, he was unable to appear before the Court on 15.02.2025, on which date the appeal was dismissed for non-prosecution. It is apparent that the petitioner has sufficient cause for his non-appearance. Consequently, the impugned order dated 15.02.2025 is set-aside and Family Appeal No.10 of 2024 is restored to its original position. The learned Appellate Court is directed to expedite the matter and dispose of the same within 60 days from today. Petition is disposed of in the above terms. Judge ARBROHI
